gmwmx2 0.0.5
  • Reference
  • Examples
    • Data generation
    • Estimate composite stochastic processes
    • Estimate regression models with dependent errors
    • Estimate regression models with dependent errors and missing observations
    • Load and plot data from the Nevada Geodetic Laboratory
    • Estimate geodetic time series from the Nevada Geodetic Laboratory
    • Estimate a small network of GNSS station
    • Plot a large network of GNSS station

Plot a gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl object

Source: R/gmwmx2.R
plot.gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl.Rd

Plot a gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl object

# S3 method for class 'gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl'
plot(x, ...)

Arguments

x

A gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl object.

...

Additional graphical parameters.

Value

No return value. Plot a gmwmx2_fit_gnss_ts_ngl object.

Examples

station_data = gmwmx2::download_station_ngl("1LSU")
# fit station with WN and AR1
fit1 <- gmwmx2(
  station_data,
  n_seasonal = 2,
  model = wn() + ar1(), component = "N"
)
fit1
#> GMWMX fit GNSS Times Series (Nevada Geodetic Laboratory)
#>                         Estimate Std.Error   CI.Lower   CI.Upper
#> Intercept              8.148e-01 2.226e-03  8.104e-01  8.191e-01
#> Trend                 -1.275e-06 4.540e-07 -2.165e-06 -3.853e-07
#> Sin (Annual)          -5.644e-04 2.250e-04 -1.005e-03 -1.235e-04
#> Cos (Annual)          -4.097e-03 2.248e-04 -4.537e-03 -3.656e-03
#> Sin (Semi-Annual)      1.124e-03 1.487e-04  8.321e-04  1.415e-03
#> Cos (Semi-Annual)     -4.307e-04 1.486e-04 -7.218e-04 -1.395e-04
#> Jump: MJD 52920        5.892e-04 1.375e-03 -2.106e-03  3.284e-03
#> Jump: MJD 53619       -2.957e-03 1.258e-03 -5.423e-03 -4.902e-04
#> Jump: MJD 53866       -4.751e-04 1.251e-03 -2.928e-03  1.978e-03
#> Jump: MJD 54637       -2.108e-04 2.014e-03 -4.159e-03  3.737e-03
#> Jump: MJD 54640        6.484e-03 2.016e-03  2.533e-03  1.044e-02
#> Jump: MJD 55300       -2.310e-03 9.677e-04 -4.206e-03 -4.132e-04
#> Jump: MJD 56671       -1.010e-03 1.302e-03 -3.562e-03  1.542e-03
#> Jump: MJD 56868        1.196e-03 1.301e-03 -1.354e-03  3.746e-03
#> Jump: MJD 58298        3.127e-03 1.977e-03 -7.481e-04  7.001e-03
#> Jump: MJD 58004        1.098e-03 1.492e-03 -1.826e-03  4.022e-03
#> Earthquake: MJD 58004 -6.512e-03 3.377e-03 -1.313e-02  1.078e-04
#> 
#> Missingness model
#>   Proportion missing : 0.0576 
#>   p1                 : 0.0072 
#>   p2                 : 0.1173 
#>   p*                 : 0.9424 
#> 
#> Stochastic model
#>   Sum of 2 processes
#>   [1] White Noise
#>        Estimated parameters : sigma2 = 1.443e-06 
#>   [2] AR(1)
#>        Estimated parameters : phi = 0.9804, sigma2 = 1.352e-07 
#> 
#> Runtime (seconds)
#>   Total              : 3.3090 
plot(fit1)

# fit station with WN and PL
fit2 <- gmwmx2(
  station_data,
  n_seasonal = 2,
  model = wn() + pl(), component = "N"
)
fit2
#> GMWMX fit GNSS Times Series (Nevada Geodetic Laboratory)
#>                         Estimate Std.Error   CI.Lower  CI.Upper
#> Intercept              8.148e-01 5.008e-01 -1.667e-01 1.796e+00
#> Trend                 -1.275e-06 1.217e-05 -2.513e-05 2.258e-05
#> Sin (Annual)          -5.644e-04 7.422e-03 -1.511e-02 1.398e-02
#> Cos (Annual)          -4.097e-03 7.404e-03 -1.861e-02 1.042e-02
#> Sin (Semi-Annual)      1.124e-03 7.133e-03 -1.286e-02 1.510e-02
#> Cos (Semi-Annual)     -4.307e-04 7.116e-03 -1.438e-02 1.352e-02
#> Jump: MJD 52920        5.892e-04 4.065e-02 -7.909e-02 8.027e-02
#> Jump: MJD 53619       -2.957e-03 3.534e-02 -7.223e-02 6.631e-02
#> Jump: MJD 53866       -4.751e-04 3.508e-02 -6.922e-02 6.827e-02
#> Jump: MJD 54637       -2.108e-04 1.161e-01 -2.277e-01 2.273e-01
#> Jump: MJD 54640        6.484e-03 1.161e-01 -2.211e-01 2.341e-01
#> Jump: MJD 55300       -2.310e-03 2.567e-02 -5.262e-02 4.800e-02
#> Jump: MJD 56671       -1.010e-03 3.719e-02 -7.390e-02 7.188e-02
#> Jump: MJD 56868        1.196e-03 3.723e-02 -7.177e-02 7.416e-02
#> Jump: MJD 58298        3.127e-03 6.089e-02 -1.162e-01 1.225e-01
#> Jump: MJD 58004        1.098e-03 4.113e-02 -7.952e-02 8.172e-02
#> Earthquake: MJD 58004 -6.512e-03 1.007e-01 -2.039e-01 1.909e-01
#> 
#> Missingness model
#>   Proportion missing : 0.0576 
#>   p1                 : 0.0072 
#>   p2                 : 0.1173 
#>   p*                 : 0.9424 
#> 
#> Stochastic model
#>   Sum of 2 processes
#>   [1] White Noise
#>        Estimated parameters : sigma2 = 8.201e-07 
#>   [2] Stationary PowerLaw
#>        Estimated parameters : kappa =    -1, sigma2 = 9.783e-07 
#> 
#> Runtime (seconds)
#>   Total              : 1.7570 
plot(fit2)

# fit station with WN and Matern
fit3 = gmwmx2(
  station_data,
  n_seasonal = 2,
  model = wn() + matern(), component = "N"
)
fit3
#> GMWMX fit GNSS Times Series (Nevada Geodetic Laboratory)
#>                         Estimate Std.Error   CI.Lower   CI.Upper
#> Intercept              8.148e-01 2.360e-03  8.101e-01  8.194e-01
#> Trend                 -1.275e-06 4.870e-07 -2.230e-06 -3.205e-07
#> Sin (Annual)          -5.644e-04 2.178e-04 -9.912e-04 -1.375e-04
#> Cos (Annual)          -4.097e-03 2.180e-04 -4.524e-03 -3.669e-03
#> Sin (Semi-Annual)      1.124e-03 1.384e-04  8.525e-04  1.395e-03
#> Cos (Semi-Annual)     -4.307e-04 1.383e-04 -7.017e-04 -1.597e-04
#> Jump: MJD 52920        5.892e-04 1.421e-03 -2.195e-03  3.374e-03
#> Jump: MJD 53619       -2.957e-03 1.320e-03 -5.544e-03 -3.695e-04
#> Jump: MJD 53866       -4.751e-04 1.314e-03 -3.050e-03  2.100e-03
#> Jump: MJD 54637       -2.108e-04 2.012e-03 -4.154e-03  3.732e-03
#> Jump: MJD 54640        6.484e-03 2.013e-03  2.538e-03  1.043e-02
#> Jump: MJD 55300       -2.310e-03 1.040e-03 -4.348e-03 -2.719e-04
#> Jump: MJD 56671       -1.010e-03 1.361e-03 -3.677e-03  1.657e-03
#> Jump: MJD 56868        1.196e-03 1.359e-03 -1.468e-03  3.860e-03
#> Jump: MJD 58298        3.127e-03 2.026e-03 -8.437e-04  7.097e-03
#> Jump: MJD 58004        1.098e-03 1.591e-03 -2.020e-03  4.216e-03
#> Earthquake: MJD 58004 -6.512e-03 3.524e-03 -1.342e-02  3.953e-04
#> 
#> Missingness model
#>   Proportion missing : 0.0576 
#>   p1                 : 0.0072 
#>   p2                 : 0.1173 
#>   p*                 : 0.9424 
#> 
#> Stochastic model
#>   Sum of 2 processes
#>   [1] White Noise
#>        Estimated parameters : sigma2 = 1.367e-06 
#>   [2] Matern
#>        Estimated parameters : sigma2 = 3.544e-06, lambda = 0.01399, alpha = 0.8837 
#> 
#> Runtime (seconds)
#>   Total              : 2.1823 
plot(fit3)
